positive.stdout:

8. ~can_block(michael,windy) [input(axiom)]
9. ! [X0] : (jumps_when_shooting(X0) => great_shooter(X0)) [input(axiom)]
11. great_shooter(windy) [input(conjecture)]
12. ~great_shooter(windy) [negated conjecture 11]
13. ~great_shooter(windy) [flattening 12]
19. ! [X0] : (can_block(michael,X0) | jumps_when_shooting(X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
20. ! [X0] : (great_shooter(X0) | ~jumps_when_shooting(X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
26. can_block(michael,X0) | jumps_when_shooting(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
27. ~can_block(michael,windy) [cnf transformation 8]
28. ~jumps_when_shooting(X0) | great_shooter(X0) [cnf transformation 20]
32. ~great_shooter(windy) [cnf transformation 13]
33. jumps_when_shooting(windy) [resolution 26,27]
34. great_shooter(windy) [resolution 33,28]
35. $false [forward subsumption resolution 34,32]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_windy.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
